title: 会议沟通 2
description: 面向取舍权衡、风险升级、范围控制、推动决策、责任对齐、时间压力、打断偏题和会后跟进的进阶会议沟通训练包。

units.title: 讨论取舍与权衡
units.communicativeGoal: 把方案讨论从好不好转成取舍关系和代价比较
activationPrompts: 你想提醒大家任何方案都有代价
你想把讨论转成可比较的 trade-off

items.englishText: The trade-off here is speed versus control.
items.chinesePrompt: 这里的取舍其实是速度和控制力之间的平衡。
variants: The trade-off here is really speed versus control.
notes: 最直接的 trade-off 点题表达。
commonMistakes: The balance here is speed and control.

items.englishText: We can absolutely do that, but only at the cost of flexibility later.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们当然可以这么做，但代价是后面的灵活性会下降。
variants: We can do that, but only at the cost of flexibility later on.
commonMistakes: We can do that, but cost is later less flexible.

items.englishText: I don't think this is about finding a perfect option so much as being clear about which downside we're willing to accept.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得这件事与其说是在找完美方案，不如说是要明确我们愿意接受哪一种 downside。
variants: I don't think this is about finding a perfect option so much as being clear about which downside we're willing to live with.
notes: 把团队从“找完美答案”拉回现实决策。
commonMistakes: This is not finding perfect option, but deciding which bad side we accept.
slots: not about finding a perfect option
which downside we're willing to accept
sampleOutputs: I don't think this is about finding a perfect option so much as being clear about which downside we're willing to accept.

items.englishText: I think we all want the faster option, but the trade-off here is that we'd be taking on more operational risk afterwards.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得大家都想选更快的方案，但这里的取舍是，我们之后会承担更多运维风险。
notes: 把偏好和代价同时说出来。
commonMistakes: We all want fast option, but later operation risk becomes more.
items.contextText: 团队在纠结更快上线还是更稳方案。

successCriteria: 完成“讨论取舍与权衡”对应的沟通动作
把方案讨论从好不好转成取舍关系和代价比较
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你想提醒大家任何方案都有代价
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想把讨论转成可比较的 trade-off
换一个相近场景，再完成“讨论取舍与权衡”这个口语动作。

units.title: 升级风险提醒
units.communicativeGoal: 当风险被低估时，把问题明确提升到需要处理的等级
activationPrompts: 你感觉团队在轻描淡写一个风险
你需要更明确地标记红线

items.englishText: At this point, I'm not comfortable treating that as a minor risk.
items.chinesePrompt: 到这个阶段，我已经不太能接受继续把这当成一个小风险来看了。
variants: At this point, I'm no longer comfortable treating that as a minor risk.
notes: 温和但明确地升级问题等级。
commonMistakes: At this point I am not okay to see this as small risk.

items.englishText: For me, that's starting to look like a red flag.
items.chinesePrompt: 对我来说，这已经开始像一个红旗信号了。
variants: To me, that's starting to look like a real red flag.
notes: 比 simply saying problem 更有信号感。
commonMistakes: For me this is becoming a warning sign big.

items.englishText: If we're still seeing the same issue this late in the process, I think we need to treat it as something structural rather than incidental.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果流程都到这么后面了我们还在看到同样的问题，我觉得这就该被视为结构性问题，而不是偶发情况。
variants: If we're still seeing the same issue this late in the process, we need to treat it as structural rather than incidental.
notes: 适合把 repeated issue 升级为结构性风险。
commonMistakes: If same issue still appears late, we should see it as structure problem.
sampleOutputs: If we're still seeing the same issue this late in the process, I think we need to treat it as something structural rather than incidental.

items.englishText: I know we're trying not to overreact, but at this point I'm not comfortable treating that as a minor risk anymore.
items.chinesePrompt: 我知道我们不想反应过度，但到这个阶段，我已经不太能接受继续把这当成一个小风险看待了。
notes: 先接住团队情绪，再升级风险判断。
commonMistakes: I know we don't want overreact, but this is not small risk now.
items.contextText: 团队有人想继续观望，你觉得已经到了必须处理的时候。

successCriteria: 完成“升级风险提醒”对应的沟通动作
当风险被低估时，把问题明确提升到需要处理的等级
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你感觉团队在轻描淡写一个风险
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你需要更明确地标记红线
换一个相近场景，再完成“升级风险提醒”这个口语动作。

units.title: 控制范围膨胀
units.communicativeGoal: 在需求或讨论不断扩张时把范围拉回可交付状态
activationPrompts: 你感觉大家又在加需求了
你想保护当前交付边界

items.englishText: I think the scope is starting to creep here.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得这里的范围开始慢慢往外长了。
variants: I think the scope is beginning to creep here.
notes: 非常典型的 scope control 表达。
commonMistakes: I think scope is becoming bigger slowly here.

items.englishText: Can we keep this manageable for the first pass?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们能不能先把第一版控制在可管理范围内？
variants: Can we keep this manageable for the initial pass?
notes: 适合把讨论拉回 first pass 思维。
commonMistakes: Can we keep this easy in first version?

items.englishText: I'm not saying those ideas aren't valuable, but if we keep adding them now, we stop having a clearly shippable version.
items.chinesePrompt: 我不是说这些想法没价值，但如果我们现在继续往里加，就没有一个清晰可上线的版本了。
variants: I'm not saying those ideas aren't valuable, but if we keep adding them now, we stop having a clearly deliverable version.
notes: 先认可价值，再强调交付边界。
commonMistakes: I don't say these ideas are not valuable, but if add now we have no clear version to ship.
sampleOutputs: I'm not saying those ideas aren't valuable, but if we keep adding them now, we stop having a clearly shippable version.

items.englishText: Those are all sensible additions, but I think the scope is starting to creep. Can we keep this manageable for the first release?
items.chinesePrompt: 这些补充都挺合理，但我觉得范围已经开始膨胀了。我们能不能先把首发控制在可管理范围内？
notes: 典型的产品/工程范围收口句。
commonMistakes: These additions are reasonable, but scope becomes bigger. Can we make first release manageable?
items.contextText: 大家在会议里不断给第一版加想法，你想保护交付范围。

successCriteria: 完成“控制范围膨胀”对应的沟通动作
在需求或讨论不断扩张时把范围拉回可交付状态
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你感觉大家又在加需求了
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想保护当前交付边界
换一个相近场景，再完成“控制范围膨胀”这个口语动作。

units.title: 推动拍板
units.communicativeGoal: 在讨论足够充分后，主动推动团队明确决定或明确未决条件
activationPrompts: 你觉得讨论已经够了，应该进入决策
你想避免会议结束了还没人知道是否拍板

items.englishText: Can we try to land a decision before we leave this topic?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们能不能在离开这个话题前先把决定落下来？
variants: Can we try to land a decision before we move on from this topic?
commonMistakes: Can we decide before leaving this topic?

items.englishText: What's still blocking us from deciding?
items.chinesePrompt: 现在到底还有什么在阻止我们做决定？
variants: What exactly is still blocking us from deciding?
notes: 适合在一直不拍板时找剩余缺口。
commonMistakes: What still blocks us to decide?

items.englishText: If we're not comfortable deciding yet, I think we should at least agree on what evidence would change that.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果我们现在还不够放心拍板，那我觉得至少要先对齐，什么证据出现后我们会愿意拍板。
variants: If we're not comfortable deciding yet, we should at least agree on what evidence would change that.
notes: 防止会议以模糊状态结束。
commonMistakes: If not comfortable decide, we should agree what proof changes it.
slots: if we're not comfortable deciding yet
sampleOutputs: If we're not comfortable deciding yet, I think we should at least agree on what evidence would change that.

items.englishText: We've heard the main concerns and the main advantages. Can we try to land a decision, or are we saying one more data point is still missing?
items.chinesePrompt: 主要顾虑和主要优势我们都已经听到了。我们能不能现在尝试拍板，还是说还明确缺一个数据点？
notes: 把“继续讨论”变成“是否还缺明确条件”。
commonMistakes: We heard advantages and concerns. Can decide or still need one more data?
items.contextText: 会议已经来回讨论很久，你想推动收束。

successCriteria: 完成“推动拍板”对应的沟通动作
在讨论足够充分后，主动推动团队明确决定或明确未决条件
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得讨论已经够了，应该进入决策
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想避免会议结束了还没人知道是否拍板
换一个相近场景，再完成“推动拍板”这个口语动作。

units.title: 对齐 owner 和责任边界
units.communicativeGoal: 把会后动作落到具体 owner、支持方和截止点
activationPrompts: 你担心会后没人真正负责
你想把负责人和支持方讲清楚

items.englishText: Can we name a single owner for this?
items.chinesePrompt: 这件事我们能不能明确一个唯一 owner？
variants: Can we identify a single owner for this?
notes: 非常适合防止“大家都负责=没人负责”。
commonMistakes: Can we choose one owner for this?

items.englishText: Who's actually driving this forward from here?
items.chinesePrompt: 从这里往后，这件事到底是谁在往前推进？
variants: Who's really driving this forward from this point?
notes: 用 actually 强调不要落在空泛责任上。
commonMistakes: Who is really making this go forward?

items.englishText: I'm hearing a lot of shared responsibility, but I think we still need one person accountable for the final outcome.
items.chinesePrompt: 我听到很多“共同负责”的说法，但我觉得我们还是需要一个人对最终结果真正负责。
variants: I'm hearing a lot of shared responsibility, but I think we still need one person accountable for the final outcome here.
notes: 适合把模糊责任重新压到 accountable owner。
commonMistakes: Many people share responsibility, but we need one people responsible for final result.
sampleOutputs: I'm hearing a lot of shared responsibility, but I think we still need one person accountable for the final outcome.

items.englishText: Before we wrap up, can we name a single owner for the next step and be clear about who they're pulling in for support?
items.chinesePrompt: 结束前我们能不能明确一下下一步的唯一 owner，以及他需要谁来配合支持？
notes: 把 owner 和 support roles 同时说清楚。
commonMistakes: Before end, can we choose owner and who helps him?
items.contextText: 你不想让 action item 以“大家回去看看”收尾。

successCriteria: 完成“对齐 owner 和责任边界”对应的沟通动作
把会后动作落到具体 owner、支持方和截止点
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你担心会后没人真正负责
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想把负责人和支持方讲清楚
换一个相近场景，再完成“对齐 owner 和责任边界”这个口语动作。

units.title: 在时间压力下控节奏
units.communicativeGoal: 当时间不够时调整会议节奏，保住关键决定
activationPrompts: 会议时间快到了但关键事还没定
你想提醒大家优先级

items.englishText: We're running short on time, so can we focus on the decision itself?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们时间有点不够了，所以能不能先聚焦在这个决定本身？
variants: We're running short on time, so can we focus on the decision itself for now?
notes: 适合把讨论从细节拉回结论。
commonMistakes: We are lacking time, so can focus on decision itself?

items.englishText: I'd like to protect the last ten minutes for next steps.
items.chinesePrompt: 我想把最后十分钟留给下一步安排。
variants: I'd like to keep the last ten minutes for next steps.
notes: 主持人很常用的时间保护表达。
commonMistakes: I want save last ten minutes for next steps.

items.englishText: Given the time, I think we need to separate what's essential to resolve now from what can be handled offline.
items.chinesePrompt: 考虑到时间，我觉得我们得把现在必须解决的点和可以会后处理的点分开。
variants: Given the time, I think we need to separate what's essential to resolve now from what we can handle offline.
notes: 非常适合控制会议收尾阶段。
commonMistakes: Considering time, we should separate what solve now and what solve after meeting.
sampleOutputs: Given the time, I think we need to separate what's essential to resolve now from what can be handled offline.

items.englishText: We're running short on time. I'd like to protect the last ten minutes for actions and owners, so can we park the implementation detail for now?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们时间有点不够了。我想把最后十分钟留给行动项和 owner，所以实现细节能不能先暂时放一放？
notes: 时间管理和 topic parking 一起用。
commonMistakes: Time is short. I want save last ten minutes for actions, so implementation detail can stop now?
items.contextText: 会议快结束了，但行动项还没对齐。

successCriteria: 完成“在时间压力下控节奏”对应的沟通动作
当时间不够时调整会议节奏，保住关键决定
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：会议时间快到了但关键事还没定
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想提醒大家优先级
换一个相近场景，再完成“在时间压力下控节奏”这个口语动作。

units.title: 打断偏题或过长发言
units.communicativeGoal: 在需要时礼貌打断并把讨论拉回主线
activationPrompts: 有人已经说太久了
你想礼貌打断并拉回主线

items.englishText: Sorry to cut in, but can I bring us back to the question on the table?
items.chinesePrompt: 抱歉打断一下，不过我能不能把大家拉回到桌面上的这个问题？
variants: Sorry to cut in, but can I bring us back to the question in front of us?
commonMistakes: Sorry interrupt, can I bring us back to question?

items.englishText: If I can jump in there, I think we're drifting a little.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果我能插一句，我觉得我们有点开始偏了。
variants: If I can jump in there, I think we're drifting slightly.
notes: 适合在偏题还不算严重时轻提醒。
commonMistakes: If I can interrupt, I think we are moving away.

items.englishText: That's useful background, but I don't want us to lose sight of the decision we're supposed to leave with today.
items.chinesePrompt: 这些背景信息很有用，但我不希望我们把今天本来要带走的那个决定给聊丢了。
variants: That's useful background, but I don't want us to lose sight of the decision we're meant to leave with today.
notes: 先认可背景价值，再把团队拉回目标。
commonMistakes: This background is useful, but I don't want we lose the decision today.
sampleOutputs: That's useful background, but I don't want us to lose sight of the decision we're supposed to leave with today.

items.englishText: Sorry to cut in, but I think we're drifting a little. Can I bring us back to what we need to decide before the end of the hour?
items.chinesePrompt: 抱歉打断一下，不过我觉得我们有点偏了。我能不能把大家拉回到我们这一个小时结束前必须决定的那件事上？
notes: 适合主持人或强 facilitation 场景。
pronunciationTargets: before the end of the hour
commonMistakes: Sorry interrupt. We are drifting. Can return to what decide before this hour ends?
items.contextText: 讨论已经偏向细节故事，你要拉回主线。

successCriteria: 完成“打断偏题或过长发言”对应的沟通动作
在需要时礼貌打断并把讨论拉回主线
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：有人已经说太久了
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想礼貌打断并拉回主线
换一个相近场景，再完成“打断偏题或过长发言”这个口语动作。

units.title: 会后跟进与收尾确认
units.communicativeGoal: 在会议结束后明确会后动作、纪要和后续节奏
activationPrompts: 会议结束了，你想把会后节奏讲清楚
你想明确谁发纪要、谁跟进问题

items.englishText: I'll send round a short summary after this.
items.chinesePrompt: 会后我会发一个简短总结出来。
variants: I'll send round a brief summary after this.
notes: 英式语感很自然，send round 很高频。
commonMistakes: I will send short summary around after this.

items.englishText: Let's make sure we follow through on the actions we agreed.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们还是确保把今天说好的行动项真正跟下去。
variants: Let's make sure we follow through on the actions we agreed on.
notes: 适合把会议和执行真正连起来。
commonMistakes: Let's make sure we continue the actions we agreed.

items.englishText: I'll capture the open questions separately so we don't lose them, but they shouldn't block the actions we've already agreed today.
items.chinesePrompt: 我会把还没定的问题单独记下来，避免丢掉，但它们不应该阻塞我们今天已经确认的行动项。
variants: I'll capture the open questions separately so we don't lose them, but they shouldn't block the actions we've already agreed on today.
notes: 适合在收尾时区分“未决问题”和“已定动作”。
commonMistakes: I will note open questions separately, but they should not stop actions we agreed today.
sampleOutputs: I'll capture the open questions separately so we don't lose them, but they shouldn't block the actions we've already agreed today.

items.englishText: Thanks, everyone. I'll send round a short summary, and let's make sure we follow through on the actions before the next check-in.
items.chinesePrompt: 谢谢大家。我会发一个简短总结出来，也请大家在下次 check-in 前把今天的行动项真正推进起来。
notes: 会后节奏和下次节点一起说清楚。
commonMistakes: I will send summary, and let's continue actions before next meeting.
items.contextText: 你在正式结束会议前强调会后节奏。

successCriteria: 完成“会后跟进与收尾确认”对应的沟通动作
在会议结束后明确会后动作、纪要和后续节奏
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：会议结束了，你想把会后节奏讲清楚
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想明确谁发纪要、谁跟进问题
换一个相近场景，再完成“会后跟进与收尾确认”这个口语动作。

units.title: 说明资源不足
units.communicativeGoal: 在会议中说明资源限制并引导取舍
activationPrompts: 你想说明资源不够，需要做取舍
你想避免承诺超出团队能力

items.englishText: We have limited capacity this quarter.
items.chinesePrompt: 这个季度我们的产能有限。
variants: Our capacity is limited this quarter.

items.englishText: If we add this, something else has to move.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果加这个，其他东西就得调整。
variants: If we add this, something else will need to move.

items.englishText: We need to trade off {scope} against {timeline}.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们需要在范围和时间线之间取舍。
variants: We need to trade off scope against timeline.
sampleOutputs: We need to trade off {scope} against {timeline}.

items.englishText: We have limited capacity this quarter. If we add this, something else has to move.
items.chinesePrompt: 这个季度产能有限。如果加这个，其他东西就要调整。
items.contextText: 你想说明资源不够，需要做取舍

successCriteria: 完成“说明资源不足”对应的沟通动作
在会议中说明资源限制并引导取舍
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你想说明资源不够，需要做取舍
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想避免承诺超出团队能力
